Politics.headline: Trump Ditches Appeal for Help in Iran War, Slamming Allies
Politics.detail: U.S. President Donald Trump abandoned his effort to recruit partners for the war with Iran and scolded allies who openly rejected his appeals, even as he repeated claims the conflict would end soon. The US and Israel kept up attacks, with Israel saying it had killed Iran's security chief, Ali Larijani, in an overnight operation.

Politics.headline: China calls for global cooperation to prevent nuclear proliferation
Politics.detail: China has called for strengthening international cooperation and multilateral efforts to address the growing challenges of nuclear proliferation, stressing the need for collective action to safeguard global security. China's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Fu Cong, emphasized that rising geopolitical tensions and ongoing conflicts are increasing risks related to nuclear weapons and technologies, making coordinated international efforts more urgent than ever.

Politics.headline: Australian PM flags new measures to buffer against global economic uncertainty
Politics.detail: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has flagged new measures to protect the country's people from the "worst" of the global economic uncertainty driven by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Albanese announced that he has called an emergency meeting with state and territory leaders to discuss measures to shield the economy.

Politics.headline: Abdullah bin Zayed holds phone calls with foreign ministers, officials to discuss regional developments
Politics.detail: H.H. Sheikh Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs, held calls with a number of Foreign Ministers and Officials to discuss the latest regional developments and the repercussions of Iran's unprovoked and terrorist missile attacks targeting the UAE and several countries in the region. They also affirmed the right of the targeted countries to take all necessary measures to safeguard their sovereignty, security, and territorial integrity, and to ensure the safety of their citizens, residents, and visitors.

Politics.headline: Crypto donations ban and new donor rules needed to tackle illicit money in UK politics, Committee finds
Politics.detail: The Joint Committee on the National Security Strategy has called for the Government to immediately ban political donations made through cryptocurrency until firm rules can be developed, in order to keep UK politics safe from illicit finance. The report also argues for new rules requiring overseas individuals to have held sufficient UK assets registered with HMRC for 12 months before donating, and for the Government to create a new national police unit to oversee political finance.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil and gas prices rise again after Iran attacks production facilities
Finance & Economy.detail: Oil and gas prices are surging following attacks on production facilities amidst the ongoing Iran war, exacerbating concerns for energy-intensive industries.

Finance & Economy.headline: Exporters seek 6-month loan moratorium, higher credit as $66 billion West Asia trade faces disruption
Finance & Economy.detail: Indian exporters are requesting a six-month loan moratorium and increased credit lines due to trade disruptions in West Asia, which is impacting a significant portion of their business.

Finance & Economy.headline: Japan begins release of oil reserves as Iran war sparks energy crisis
Finance & Economy.detail: As the Iran war continues, Japan has started releasing its oil reserves in response to the energy crisis caused by the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

Finance & Economy.headline: Grocery Commissioner puts supermarkets on notice
Finance & Economy.detail: New Zealand's Grocery Commissioner has put supermarkets on notice as shoppers brace for further food price increases, anticipating the impact of the Iran war on supermarket shelves.

Finance & Economy.headline: European Commission issues €9 billion in its 3rd syndicated transaction of 2026
Finance & Economy.detail: The European Commission has successfully raised €9 billion through its third syndicated transaction of EU-Bonds for 2026, marking a significant financial activity for the year.

Technology.headline: UBS faced technology outage that impacted trading business, Bloomberg News reports
Technology.detail: UBS experienced a technology outage that affected its trading operations, according to a Bloomberg News report.

Technology.headline: Computer Resources of America Earns Place on CRN's Prestigious 2026 Tech Elite 250 List
Technology.detail: Computer Resources of America (CRA) has been named to CRN’s 2026 Tech Elite 250 list, recognizing their commitment to technical excellence in AI, cloud, infrastructure, and security.

Technology.headline: Oura Ring 4 goes on sale in India starting March 18: Price starts at Rs 28,900 with a monthly catch.
Technology.detail: The Finnish health tech company Oura has launched its Ring 4 in India, with prices starting at Rs 28,900.

Technology.headline: Germany's largest underground project: Liebherr cranes play a central role in the construction of Hamburg's U5 line.
Technology.detail: Liebherr cranes are essential to the construction of Hamburg's U5 underground line, Germany's largest underground project.

Technology.headline: Microsoft Warns of Hackers Supercharging Cyberattacks With AI.
Technology.detail: Microsoft is warning about the potential for hackers to use AI to enhance and accelerate their cyberattacks.

Health.headline: Children With Autism Face Growing Unmet Healthcare Needs
Health.detail: A recent report highlights the increasing challenges faced by children with autism in accessing adequate healthcare services, including diagnosis, treatment, and support.

Health.headline: Change Healthcare Breach Still Affecting Docs, Hospitals
Health.detail: The aftermath of the Change Healthcare cyberattack continues to disrupt healthcare operations, causing ongoing challenges for doctors and hospitals in terms of billing, payments, and patient care coordination.

Health.headline: Meningitis is back – and here is why
Health.detail: An increase in meningitis cases, particularly in university settings, has prompted concerns among health officials, with experts discussing the factors contributing to the resurgence of this potentially deadly disease.

Health.headline: ADHD Brains Show Sleep-like Activity Even While Awake
Health.detail: New research suggests that individuals with ADHD experience brief episodes of sleep-like brain activity even when awake and performing tasks, which may explain difficulties with focus and attention.

Health.headline: Fixing a Tooth Infection May Improve Blood Sugar and Heart Health
Health.detail: A clinical study indicates that successful root canal treatment can lead to better blood sugar control, healthier cholesterol levels, and reduced inflammation, suggesting a link between dental health and overall well-being.

Sports.headline: Broncos get star wide receiver Jaylen Waddle from Dolphins in a blockbuster trade, AP sources say
Sports.detail: The Broncos have acquired star wide receiver Jaylen Waddle from the Dolphins in a significant trade, according to AP sources.

Sports.headline: Laporta wins 5 more years as president of Barcelona after thousands vote in club election
Sports.detail: Joan Laporta has been re-elected as president of Barcelona for another five years following a club election with thousands of voters.

Sports.headline: 'I was struggling to feel my hands': Aston Martin's problems laid bare by Alonso's woe in China
Sports.detail: Fernando Alonso experienced severe vibrations in his Aston Martin during the China GP, leading to concerns about potential nerve damage due to the car's Honda engine.

Sports.headline: Chandrika Bags Gold As India Finish With 5 Medals At World Boxing Futures Cup
Sports.detail: Chandrika secured a gold medal, contributing to India's total of five medals at the World Boxing Futures Cup.

Sports.headline: Senegal stripped of AFCON title
Sports.detail: Senegal has been stripped of its AFCON title.

Entertainment.headline: U.S. court rules against South Korean gaming firm over AI-hatched takeover plan
Entertainment.detail: A Delaware judge ruled against Krafton, a South Korean game developer, ordering them to reinstate the head of one of their video game studios after the company improperly removed him based on advice from ChatGPT during a $250 million dispute.

Entertainment.headline: Review | The Mayhem Ball with Lady Gaga
Entertainment.detail: Lady Gaga's Mayhem Ball show, celebrating her Grammy-winning album, featured elaborate costumes, energetic dancing, and creative remixes of her hit songs like "Poker Face," with highlights including performances of "Paparazzi" and "Disease."

Entertainment.headline: Michigan iGaming, online sports betting operators report $313M in February revenue
Entertainment.detail: Michigan's commercial and tribal operators reported $313.0 million in combined internet gaming (iGaming) gross receipts and online sports betting gross receipts in February, a 12.2% decrease from January 2026, with iGaming gross receipts totaling $273.1 million and online sports betting gross receipts totaling $39.9 million.

Entertainment.headline: One Battle After Another sweeps Oscars with six awards, including best picture
Entertainment.detail: The film 'One Battle After Another' dominated the Oscars, securing six awards including the prestigious Best Picture.

Entertainment.headline: Patrick Kinahan: Thanks to Dybantsa, BYU basketball goes primetime.
Entertainment.detail: BYU basketball's game time was practically set weeks ago, with Dybantsa playing a key role in the team's primetime slot.

Crime & Justice.headline: Utah woman who wrote book on grief after husband's death found guilty of murdering him
Crime & Justice.detail: Kouri Richins, a Utah woman who authored a children's book about grief following her husband's death, has been convicted of his murder, which involved fatal poisoning.

Crime & Justice.headline: California highway patrol officer charged with murder over crash that killed four
Crime & Justice.detail: A California Highway Patrol officer has been charged with murder in connection to a car crash that resulted in the deaths of four individuals.

Crime & Justice.headline: Colorado funeral home owner given 18-year sentence in decaying bodies case
Crime & Justice.detail: The owner of a funeral home in Colorado has been sentenced to 18 years in prison relating to a case involving decaying bodies.

Crime & Justice.headline: 'He's definitely no Walter White': former US academic charged with dealing meth
Crime & Justice.detail: A former US academic has been charged with dealing methamphetamine, prompting the quip that he is 'definitely no Walter White'.

Crime & Justice.headline: Florida man arrested over alleged $328M crypto Ponzi scheme
Crime & Justice.detail: A Florida man has been arrested and charged with running an alleged $328 million crypto Ponzi scheme, using investor funds for personal luxuries.

Education.headline: Judge strikes down Arkansas law mandating schools display the Ten Commandments
Education.detail: An Arkansas law requiring that the Ten Commandments be prominently displayed in public school classrooms was struck down by a federal judge.

Education.headline: College Republicans sue University of Florida's president over deactivation of its chapter
Education.detail: College Republicans sue University of Florida's president over deactivation of its chapter.

Education.headline: DfE's £15m boost for marketing a 'slap in face' for families
Education.detail: The Department for Education's £15m boost for marketing is being called a 'slap in the face' for families.

Education.headline: Exclusive: Exclusions and absence cut under early identification approach – study
Education.detail: A recent study shows that exclusions and absence have been cut with an early identification approach.

Education.headline: Last pro-Palestinian protester detained by Trump administration released
Education.detail: Leqaa Kordia, a Palestinian woman detained for a year amid a Trump administration crackdown on protesters last spring, was released on bond.

Lifestyle.headline: Horoscope Today, March 18, 2026: Something unforeseen may delay your current efforts on the professional front.
Sara Tendulkar shares pictures of traditional Maharashtrian look with nath from her brother's wedding.
Lifestyle.detail: Sara Tendulkar shares pictures of traditional Maharashtrian look with nath from her brother's wedding.

Lifestyle.headline: Vanity Fair Oscar Party guests receive ultra exclusive hand embroidered shawls from Nita Ambani's handicraft brand.
Lifestyle.detail: Guests at the Vanity Fair Oscar Party received hand-embroidered shawls from Nita Ambani's handicraft brand.

Lifestyle.headline: The dirtiest item in your home might be sitting by your sink.
Lifestyle.detail: An article discussing the dirtiest item in your home.

Lifestyle.headline: Bryan Johnson shares '15-second call' method to strengthen friendships, but experts warn it could leave you lonely.
Lifestyle.detail: Bryan Johnson shares a '15-second call' method to strengthen friendships.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Shocking statistics highlight adolescent pregnancy crisis
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Manila Times emphasizes the urgent need to address the adolescent pregnancy crisis, citing alarming statistics that reveal the extent of the problem.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: US set to boost explosives production
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The US Army is planning to build new facilities to boost explosives production and strengthen its supply chain, a move aimed at addressing munitions shortages and supporting obligations to partners including Taiwan, Ukraine and Israel, Defense News reported.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Sara responds to impeach complaints
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Vice President Sara Duterte beat the House of Representatives' deadline yesterday for her to comment on her two impeachment cases, but made it clear she did it with reservations, and implied she would not honor the chamber's jurisdiction.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: How to solve the Hormuz crisis
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Washington Post discusses potential solutions to the Hormuz crisis in their editorial, providing their analysis and recommendations.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Trump's recklessness endangers the nation
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Los Angeles Times discusses the recklessness of President Trump and how it endangers the nation.

World.headline: Iran confirms security chief Larijani, Basij commander Soleimani killed
World.detail: Iran's national security council confirms the death of its chief, Ali Larijani, along with Basij commander Soleimani, amidst rising tensions in the Middle East.

World.headline: Trump says US does not need Nato after being rebuffed over strait of Hormuz
World.detail: Following disagreements over securing the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump declared that the United States does not require NATO's assistance.

World.headline: European leaders rebuff Trump's call to open the Strait of Hormuz
World.detail: European leaders have rejected President Trump's request to open the Strait of Hormuz, leading to increased strain on international relations.

World.headline: Trump says U.S. 'doing something with Cuba very soon' after blackout
World.detail: Amidst a major electrical grid collapse in Cuba, President Trump announced that the U.S. will be taking action concerning the island nation.

World.headline: Iranian regime facing setback after Israel confirms death of new de-facto leader
World.detail: Following the confirmed death of Iran's de facto leader, the Iranian regime faces a significant setback, according to reports from Israel.

Zimbabwe.headline: Farmers hail localisation of agric inputs procurement
Zimbabwe.detail: The Zimbabwe Farmers Union has praised Statutory Instrument (SI) 87 of 2025, Agricultural Marketing.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zim has enough forex
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe has sufficient foreign currency to cover all bona fide imports of goods and services.

Zimbabwe.headline: Agric sector fees review gets Cabinet nod
Zimbabwe.detail: Cabinet has approved the review of fees in the agricultural sector.

Zimbabwe.headline: Triple national heroes' burial slated for Monday
Zimbabwe.detail: A triple burial for national heroes is scheduled for Monday.

Zimbabwe.headline: Govt warns of fraudsters impersonating VP Chiwenga
Zimbabwe.detail: The government is cautioning the public about fraudsters who are impersonating Vice President Chiwenga.
